name: tbm
description: Source for thebenmeadows.com — a static personal link hub (HTML + Tailwind).

scripts.build:netlify: npm run build && rm -rf dist && mkdir dist && cp index.html 404.html output.css email.js theme.js btm-logo.png me.png og.png robots.txt sitemap.xml _headers dist/ && cp -R favicon icons fonts .well-known mirrors tech dist/
